violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Paper/plastic products to be used until dishwasher is serviced and reaching proper sanitizing concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

The door to the outside, located at the side of the building, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
